name: Caramel Apple Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except peanuts in a mixing bowl.
2. Mix until smooth using a wooden spoon.
3. Stir in chopped peanuts.
4. Chill the mixture.
5. Just before serving, slice apples using an apple peeler/corer/slicer.
6. Arrange sliced apples around the dip and serve.
7. Variation: Substitute 1 can (8 ounces) crushed pineapple, drained for the apple butter.
Yield: Approximately 2 cups
